scripts.db:migrate: prisma migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:reset: prisma migrate reset --force --schema prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && npm run db:seed
scripts.test: npm run build && node test/analysis/accuracy.test.mjs && node test/analysis/local-stockfish-engine.test.mjs && node test/repertoire-coverage/repertoire-coverage.test.mjs && node test/analysis-reintegration/analysis-reintegration.test.mjs && node test/courses/course-ownership.test.mjs && node test/mcp/mcp-transport.test.mjs
